patches.description: Replaces the default Twitter (X) Blue signature theme with the user's Material You palette.

patches.description: Replaces the Twitter Bluish Dim theme with the user's Material You 3 neutral palette.
patches.name: Full Monet Theme

patches.description: Replaces the LightsOut (Amoled) Twitter theme with lighter Grey color.
patches.name: Grey Theme Patch

patches.description: Hides the view count of Posts.

patches.description: Replaces the X icon with original Blue Twitter icon.
patches.name: OG Bird icon

patches.description: Replaces the app name from nonsense X to Twitter and words like post to tweet, repost to retweet, etc.
patches.name: OG Twitter brand

patches.description: Unlocks the ability to download any video. GIFs can be downloaded via the menu on long press.
patches.name: Unlock downloads

patches.description: Replaces the X icon with a white Bird keeping black background.
patches.name: White Bird icon
